patches.summary: Teach paginatedGet to collect resource-named arrays and follow dotted cursor paths.
patches.reason: Amazon SP-API FBA inventory returns rows under inventorySummaries and the next page cursor under pagination.nextToken, but the generated helper only checked generic array keys and literal top-level cursor keys.

patches.summary: Add Amazon Seller novel computed report commands for profitability, inventory, sales, brand analytics, listing, and account health insights.
patches.reason: The published Amazon Seller CLI needs curated multi-report computations that go beyond one-to-one SP-API endpoint wrappers while preserving the existing output and local SQLite conventions.

patches.summary: Add Fulfillment Inbound v2024-03-20 inbound plan creation, polling, inspection, cancellation, and option workflow commands.
patches.reason: Amazon Seller users need a safe terminal workflow for FBA inbound plans, including CSV-to-request conversion, raw JSON passthrough, async operation polling, and guarded confirmation operations.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./...; go vet ./...; verify-skill; Amazon static sandbox smoke passed for create/status/list/get/cancel, packing, placement, transportation list, and transportation confirm. Static sandbox rejected generateTransportationOptions with InvalidInput even with the official model fixture body.

patches.summary: Address review findings in Amazon Seller novel profitability and account-health computations.
patches.reason: Storage fee rollups must not let nullable fee components undercount SKU P&L, and account health must not silently report zero active listings when the listings query fails.
